message:
GSD — Get Shit Done

QUICK START
  /gsd start <tpl>   Start a workflow template
  /gsd               Run next unit (same as /gsd next)
  /gsd auto          Run all queued units continuously
  /gsd pause         Pause auto-mode
  /gsd stop          Stop auto-mode gracefully

VISIBILITY
  /gsd status         Dashboard  (⌃⌥G / ⌃⇧G)
  /gsd parallel watch Parallel monitor  (⌃⌥P)
  /gsd notifications  Notification history  (⌃⌥N / ⌃⇧N)
  /gsd visualize      Interactive 10-tab TUI
  /gsd queue          …

GSD API Key Manager

  LLM Providers
  ✓ anthropic            — env ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
  ✗ claude-code          — not configured
  ✗ openai               — not configured (platform.openai.com/api-keys)
  ✗ github-copilot       — not configured (env: GITHUB_TOKEN)
  ✗ openai-codex         — not configured
  ✓ google-gemini-cli    — OAuth (expired — will auto-refresh)
  ✓ google-antigravity   — OAuth (expired — will auto-refresh)
  ✓ google               — env GEMINI_API_KEY
  ✓ groq               …
LLM provider setup: run /login to sign in via OAuth, or /gsd keys add to paste an API key.
Context7: No CONTEXT7_API_KEY set. Using free tier (1000 req/month limit). Set CONTEXT7_API_KEY for higher limits.
